## Summary
- What changed
- Why it changed

## Validation
- [ ] `python3 scripts/validate_repo.py`
- [ ] `python3 scripts/eval_triggers.py`
- [ ] Relevant fixture or skill example commands

## Checklist
- [ ] Canonical edits are limited to `skills/`, repo tooling, or fixtures
- [ ] Generated adapters were rebuilt if canonical skills changed
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated if public behavior changed
